libraryStrings.loadInvalidProjectBundle: The selected project file is not a valid H5P project bundle.
libraryStrings.loadUnsupportedFileType: Select a .py or .txt file, or a .h5pproject bundle for multi-file projects.
libraryStrings.loadReadError: The selected file could not be read.
libraryStrings.loadFailedMessage: The selected file could not be loaded.
libraryStrings.imagesDescription: Upload images for the current coding session.
libraryStrings.imagesHelp: Use h5p_images["filename.png"]["url"] for browser-based loaders and h5p_images["filename.png"]["path"] for Pyodide file-based loaders. In Pyodide, the file is also available directly as images/filename.png.
libraryStrings.soundsDescription: Upload sounds and music for the current coding session.
libraryStrings.soundsHelp: Use h5p_sounds["filename.wav"]["url"] for browser-based loaders and h5p_sounds["filename.wav"]["path"] for Pyodide file-based loaders. In Pyodide, the file is also available directly as sounds/filename.wav.
